summary: Iteration 103 - Offline Sync Bug Fixes PASSED. All 3 critical bugs fixed: 1) SSRTE sync now stores ALL fields, 2) REDD sync stores in correct collection (redd_tracking_visits) with calculated score, 3) Empty offline_id dedup bug fixed. Backend 9/9 tests passed, Frontend SSRTE modal pre-fill and agent tabs verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: agent_search.py line 662-688: ssrte_visit sync handler now stores ALL fields (taille_menage, nombre_enfants, liste_enfants, conditions_vie, eau_courante, electricite, distance_ecole_km, enfants_observes, observations) - VERIFIED
agent_search.py line 752-796: redd_visit sync handler stores in redd_tracking_visits (not redd_visits) with calculated redd_score and redd_level - VERIFIED
agent_search.py line 643: Dedup fix - only checks offline_id if truthy (if offline_id:) preventing empty string matching all entries - VERIFIED
field_agent_dashboard.py line 433-438: my-farmers endpoint checks redd_tracking_visits for REDD completion status - VERIFIED
SSRTEVisitModal.jsx catch block (line 211-224): Now sends full visitData object for offline sync - VERIFIED
